decisions.rationale: Backend sends 'Developer' or 'GESTOR' but Scope 2 defines 'SUPER_USER, ADMIN, GERENTE, COLABORADOR'. Normalize at auth layer.
Per war room rules: show real errors instead of silent fallbacks. Pages show 'Dados indisponíveis' if backend fails.
Scope 2 section 5.10: 'A tela Indicadores será removida'. Data redistributed to Dashboard, Financeiro, Comercial, Ranking.
